title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Woodland

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Woodland
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Woodland! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Woodland:
Woodland is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Woodland!
